story.description: As a user, I want to register for a new account with my email and password
story.acceptance_criteria:
- User should be able to enter email and password
    - Password must be at least 8 characters
    - Email must be valid format
    - User should receive confirmation email
    - Duplicate email registration should be rejected

test_cases.title: Successful User Registration
test_cases.description: Verify that a user can successfully register for a new account with a valid email and a password meeting the minimum length requirement.
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter a unique and valid email address (e.g., 'testuser@example.com') in the email field.
Enter a strong password of at least 8 characters (e.g., 'MyPassw0rd!') in the password field.
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
test_cases.expected_result: The user account should be successfully created. The system should redirect to a success page, login page, or display a success message.

test_cases.title: Confirmation Email Sent After Registration
test_cases.description: Verify that a confirmation email is sent to the user's registered email address upon successful account creation, as per acceptance criteria.
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter a unique and valid email address (e.g., 'confirmuser@example.com') in the email field.
Enter a strong password of at least 8 characters (e.g., 'SecureP@ss') in the password field.
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
Access the inbox of 'confirmuser@example.com'.
test_cases.expected_result: A confirmation email from the application should be received in the inbox of 'confirmuser@example.com'. The email should contain a link or instructions to verify the account.

test_cases.title: Registration with Invalid Email Format
test_cases.description: Verify that the system rejects registration attempts when an invalid email address format is provided.
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter an invalid email address (e.g., 'invalid-email', 'user@', 'user@domain') in the email field.
Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., 'ValidP@ss1') in the password field.
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message indicating 'Email must be a valid format' or similar should be displayed. The account should not be created.

test_cases.title: Registration with Password Less Than 8 Characters
test_cases.description: Verify that the system rejects registration attempts when the provided password is less than 8 characters long.
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter a unique and valid email address (e.g., 'shortpass@example.com') in the email field.
Enter a password less than 8 characters (e.g., 'short') in the password field.
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message indicating 'Password must be at least 8 characters' or similar should be displayed. The account should not be created.

test_cases.title: Registration with Already Registered Email
test_cases.description: Verify that the system prevents the creation of a new account if the email address is already registered in the system.
steps: Pre-condition: Ensure an account exists with email 'existinguser@example.com'.
Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter the already registered email address (e.g., 'existinguser@example.com') in the email field.
Enter a valid password (e.g., 'NewP@ssw0rd') in the password field.
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message indicating 'Email already registered', 'This email is already in use', or similar should be displayed. The system should not create a new account.

test_cases.title: Registration with Password Exactly 8 Characters
test_cases.description: Verify that the system successfully registers a user when the password length is exactly 8 characters (boundary condition for password length).
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter a unique and valid email address (e.g., 'eightcharpass@example.com') in the email field.
Enter a password that is exactly 8 characters long (e.g., 'password') in the password field.
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
test_cases.expected_result: The user account should be successfully created. The system should redirect to a success page, login page, or display a success message.

test_cases.title: Registration with Email Containing Allowed Special Characters
test_cases.description: Verify that the system successfully registers a user when the email address contains valid special characters (e.g., periods, plus signs in the local part).
steps: Navigate to the user registration page.
Enter a unique and valid email address with special characters (e.g., 'first.last+tag@example.com') in the email field.
Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., 'SecureP@ss2') in the password field.
Click the 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
test_cases.expected_result: The user account should be successfully created. The system should redirect to a success page, login page, or display a success message. A confirmation email should be sent to 'first.last+tag@example.com'.

test_data.constraints: Must be valid email format, allows special characters like '.' and '+' in local part
Must be valid email format (missing '@' symbol)
Must be valid email format (invalid domain part)
Must be valid email format (empty string)
Must be valid email format; must be unique in the system
